blocks.text:
你是一个专业的软件工程师，请帮我全面诊断分析 Trade ERP 系统的状态。

请执行以下诊断（只读取文件，不要修改任何文件）：

1. 项目结构：列出所有 API 路由文件、主要页面组件、数据库 schema
2. 代码质量：检查是否有明显的错误、未完成的代码（TODO/FIXME/HACK）
3. 数据库 schema 分析：prisma/schema.prisma 的完整性
4. API 路由：检查关键路由的错误处理
5. 依赖检查：package.json 的依赖是否合理

系统当前运行状态：
- Docker 容器：trade-erp-v0.9.2 和 trade-erp-db 都在运行，状态 healthy
- 版本：v0.9.4
- API 健康检查：HTTP 200
- 数据库：只有 1 个用户，1 个 product_categories，其他表数据为空
- Git：84 个未提交的文件变更
- Next.js 16.1.6
- PostgreSQL 16

请用中文输出完整的诊断报告，包括系统概述、代码质量评估、发现的问题清单、改进建议。注意：只读取和分析，不要修改任何文件。

{

    "content": "generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

model User {
  id                           String              @id @default(cuid())
  email                        String              @unique
  name                         String?
  passwordHash                 String?
  role                         RoleEnum            @default(ADMIN)
  avatar                       String?
  createdAt                    DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt                    DateTime            @updatedAt
  isApproved                   Boolean             @default(false)
  approvalHistory              ApprovalHistory[]   @relation("ApprovalHistoryApprover")
  approvalApprovals            ApprovalRecord[]    @relation("ApprovalApprover")
  approvalInitiations          ApprovalRecord[]    @relation("ApprovalInitiator")
  approvedCommissions          Commission[]        @relation("CommissionApprovedBy")
  userCommissions              Commission[]        @relation("CommissionUser")
  customers                    Customer[]          @relation("Owner")
  applicantExpenses            Expense[]
  orders                       Order[]             @relation("SalesRep")
  performanceMetrics           PerformanceMetric[]
  platformAccounts             PlatformAccount[]
  calculatedProfitCalculations ProfitCalculation[]
  salesRepProfitDetails        ProfitDetail[]
  purchaseOrders               PurchaseOrder[]     @relation("Purchaser")
  applicantReimbursements      Reimbursement[]
  suppliers                    Supplier[]          @relation("Owner")
  createdTransactions          Transaction[]
  userRegistrations            UserRegistration[]
  userRoles                    UserRole[]

  @@map("users")
}

model Customer {
  id          String            @id @default(cuid())
  companyName String
  contactName String?
  email       String?
  phone       String?
  country     String?
  address     String?
  website     String?
  source      String?
  status      CustomerStatus    @default(ACTIVE)
  creditLevel String?
  notes       String?
  ownerId     String?
  createdAt   DateTime          @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime          @updatedAt
  contacts    CustomerContact[]
  owner       User?             @relation("Owner", fields: [ownerId], references: [id])
  inquiries   Inquiry[]
  orders      Order[]
  quotations  Quotation[]

  @@index([status, createdAt])
  @@index([ownerId])
  @@map("customers")
}

model CustomerContact {
  id         String   @id @default(cuid())
  customerId String
  name       String
  position   String?
  email      String?
  phone      String?
  isPrimary  Boolean  @default(false)
  notes      String?
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt
  customer   Customer @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("customer_contacts")
}

model Product {
  id                 String                  @id @default(cuid())
  sku                String                  @unique
  name               String
  nameEn             String?
  specification      String?
  unit               String                  @default("PCS")
  costPrice          Decimal                 @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  salePrice          Decimal                 @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  currency           String                  @default("USD")
  images             String[]
  description        String?
  descriptionEn      String?
  weight             Decimal?                @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  volume             Decimal?                @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  moq                Int?
  leadTime           Int?
  status             ProductStatus           @default(ACTIVE)
  createdAt          DateTime                @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime                @updatedAt
  deletedAt          DateTime?
  categoryId         String?
  categoryOld        String?
  inboundOrderItems  InboundOrderItem[]
  inventoryItems     InventoryItem[]
  inventoryLogs      InventoryLog[]
  orderItems         OrderItem[]
  outboundOrderItems OutboundOrderItem[]
  overseasInventory  OverseasInventory[]
  attributeValues    ProductAttributeValue[]
  category           ProductCategory?        @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  profitDetails      ProfitDetail[]
  purchaseOrderItems PurchaseOrderItem[]
  quotationItems     QuotationItem[]

  @@map("products")
}

model Inquiry {
  id           String        @id @default(cuid())
  inquiryNo    String        @unique
  customerId   String
  source       String?
  status       InquiryStatus @default(NEW)
  priority     Priority      @default(MEDIUM)
  products     String?
  quantity     Int?
  targetPrice  Decimal?      @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  currency     String        @default("USD")
  requirements String?
  deadline     DateTime?
  assignedTo   String?
  notes        String?
  createdAt    DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime      @updatedAt
  followUps    FollowUp[]

model Commission {
  id               String           @id @default(cuid())
  commissionNo     String           @unique
  userId           String
  period           String
  startDate        DateTime
  endDate          DateTime
  status           CommissionStatus @default(DRAFT)
  ruleId           String?
  salesCommission  Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  profitCommission Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  targetBonus      Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  otherBonus       Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  adjustment       Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalCommission  Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalSales       Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  totalProfit      Decimal          @default(0) @db.Decimal(14, 2)
  orderCount       Int              @default(0)
  approvedById     String?
  approvedAt       DateTime?
  paidAt           DateTime?
  accountId        String?
  transactionId    String?
  notes            String?
  details          Json             @default("[]")
  createdAt        DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime         @updatedAt
  account          Account?         @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id])
  approvedBy       User?            @relation("CommissionApprovedBy", fields: [approvedById], references: [id])
  rule             PerformanceRule? @relation(fields: [ruleId], references: [id])
  transaction      Transaction?     @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  user             User             @relation("CommissionUser", fields: [userId], references: [id])
  profitDetails    ProfitDetail[]   @relation("CommissionProfitDetails")

  @@index([userId, period])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([period])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("commissions")
}
